game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Your dogs have been dognapped by a beaked lunatic named Glorkon who stuffed them into his eye holes and is using their life essence to destroy the universe. You're partnered with Trover, a little purple eye-hole monster who isn’t a huge fan of working or being put in the position of having to save the universe. He’s also not that big a fan of you quite frankly, and neither am I. (Jk, you’re great)

Only you and Trover can save everything in this bizarre comedy adventure, created by Squanch Games!

  • A comedy adventure filled with combat, platforming, puzzles, and morally questionable choices. See how the best intentions can go horribly awry.

  • You control Trover's movements, but not his mouth. He’s got a lot to say about what’s going on in the game.

  • Travel the cosmos to experience a variety of weird alien planets and bizarre characters with big personalities.

  • Upgrade Trover AND YOURSELF with new abilities to (hopefully) defeat Glorkon while evading awkward situations.

  • You'll be immersed in weirdness, no matter which display you use -- play on TV, monitor or VR headset displays.

  • BONUS! INCLUDES FREE DLC:

    • JOPO MODE: A new way to play!

    • IMPORTANT COSMIC JOBS: Explore Trover's workplace to help co-workers, prevent grievous harm, and unlock original comedy sketches.
game_info.description: You are the Chairorpian, tasked with rescuing your dogs from the mad Glorkon who has imprisoned them in his eye sockets! Control Trover, a purple eye-hole monster, as you traverse bizarre alien worlds filled with platforms, enemies, and cosmic challenges. Collect power gems to upgrade abilities, defeat Glorkon's minions, and ultimately face the beaked lunatic himself to save your dogs and the universe. Navigate through three increasingly dangerous worlds, each with unique enemies and environmental hazards.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move Trover left/right and jump
Space: Fire energy blast attack
Z: Activate special dash ability (unlocked after collecting power gems)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and navigation mechanics. Validates that Trover can move left/right, jump between platforms, and navigate the first world without falling into hazards.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move through the level systematically, testing horizontal movement and jumping. Collect nearby power gems while avoiding basic enemies. Focus on staying alive and exploring the world boundaries.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate platforms, collect at least 3 power gems, and survive for at least 500 frames. Test passes if player maintains position on platforms without falling off the world.

TEST_2.test_description: Full win condition test implementing optimal strategy to defeat Glorkon and complete the game. Tests combat mechanics, ability upgrades, and boss battle.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Collect all power gems systematically to unlock dash ability. Defeat enemies efficiently using energy blasts. Progress through all three worlds, learning enemy patterns. Engage Glorkon with upgraded abilities and defeat him using dash dodges and precise attacks.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating Glorkon. Collect minimum 10 power gems, reach the final world, and reduce Glorkon's health to zero. Test successful when win screen displays.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing combat mechanics and enemy interaction. Validates shooting mechanics, hit detection, enemy AI behavior, and damage systems work correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Seek out enemies actively and engage in combat. Test shooting at various distances and angles. Verify that hits register correctly and enemies respond to damage. Test taking damage and health system.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully defeat at least 5 enemies using energy blasts. Verify health decreases when hit by enemies. Test passes if combat feels responsive and hit detection works accurately.
